_comment: Copy to {SETTLEMENT_DATA_DIR}/manifest.json (or set SETTLEMENT_MANIFEST_JSON). One entry per country GeoPackage. 'iso2' is the reverse-geocode match key; 'file' may be a bare filename (resolved against SETTLEMENT_DATA_DIR), an absolute path, or an s3:// URI. GRID3 layer names are version-specific per country - copy the exact layer name and building-count column from each GeoPackage.
